scope: Run the symmetric enterprise-response benchmark review with both candidates in the review lane

decision_context.prior_state: The enterprise-only review batch still favored ai-rfp-response-copilot because it remained the only discovered challenger and therefore retained breakout support.
decision_context.decision: Move both ai-security-questionnaire-copilot and ai-rfp-response-copilot into promotion review, rerun the same tight enterprise panel, and use that symmetric result as the first-admission decision point.
decision_context.why_now: The remaining admission question could not be answered cleanly while one candidate still received discovery-lane support.

files_expected.purpose: Stores the symmetric enterprise benchmark-review spec.
Stores the symmetric enterprise benchmark-review run output.
Summarizes the clean admission decision between the questionnaire and RFP wedges.
Captures the request and verification plan for the symmetric review tranche.

planned_steps: Generate the symmetric enterprise spec with both enterprise-response candidates in promotion review
Compare the two enterprise-response candidates against each other and the maintained benchmarks

expected_checks: both enterprise-response domains appear in promotion_review_domain_ids
the breakout shock is absent from the scenario
the note names the first maintained benchmark admission recommendation

guardrails: Do not auto-edit the maintained benchmark library in this tranche
Keep the result in exploratory_frontier until the maintained benchmark proposal is reviewed
State clearly whether the recommendation is driven by ensemble performance or flagship choice signal
